string.text: Simultaneous analysis bandwidth - 5 MHz; Speed - 20 MHz/s / 8 MHz/s; Displayed frequency band / spectrum resolution - 5 MHz / 25 kHz, 1 MHz / 6 kHz; Spectrum display modes - instant, averaged, accumulated;
Direction finding method - amplitude; Base kit frequency range - 0.3 – 3000 MHz; Full kit frequency range - 0.3 – 18,000 MHz; Signal level evaluation limits (with attenuators) - -10 … 110 dB.

Channel switching speed - 50 channels/s; Bandwidth when recording radio signal fragments - 5 MHz, 2 MHz, 250 kHz, 120 kHz, 50 kHz, 25 kHz, 9 kHz, 6 kHz; Types of recorded information - radio signal, time, frequency.
Explosives, WMD (nerve and blister agents), white powders, narcotics, toxic industrial chemicals, common chemicals.
Conduct a test of the "Erika-302" radio.
Conduct a test of the "Granit 2R-44" radio.
Conduct a test of the "Berkut-801MK" radio.
Conduct a test of the "Barmitsa-RS" radio.
Conduct a test of the "Tulip" (22RTP-2-CM) radio.
Specs of "Erika-302": Range - 148-174; 440-470 MHz; Number of channels - 16; Frequency step - 12.5 / 25 kHz.
Specs of "Granit 2R-44": Range - 136-174 MHz; Side channel suppression - 70 dB; Output power - 20 W.
Specs of "Berkut-801MK": Number of frequency conversions - 2; Output power - 8 W; Receiver sensitivity - 0.12 µV.
Specs of "Barmitsa-RS": Range - 44.025 - 55.975 MHz; Number of working channels - 480; Number of masking keys - 2128.
Specs of "Tulip (22RTP-2-CM)": Range - 140-174 MHz; Frequency deviation - no more than 10 kHz; Nonlinear distortion coefficient - no more than 10%.
Indicator tubes IT-51 detect sarin, soman, V-agents.
Indicator tubes IT-45 are designed to detect phosgene, diphosgene, hydrogen cyanide, cyanogen chloride.
Indicator tube IT-36 detects arsine, hydrogen sulfide, nitrogen oxides, phosgene, cyanogen chloride.
Indicator tubes IT-37 detect amino acids.
Take the first sample for sarin.
Take the second sample for diphosgene.
Take the third sample for hydrogen sulfide.
Take the first sample for amino acids.
Required components for assembling the gas mask are missing.
Required equipment for testing the radio is missing.
Using this will take the first sample for the first type of CWA.
Using this will take the second sample for the second type of CWA.
Using this will take the third sample for the third type of CWA.
Using this will take the fourth sample for the fourth type of CWA.
Required electronic components for soldering are missing.
Microchips required for measurement are missing.
Required components for assembling the explosive device are missing.
Enter two parameters: "long-delay fuse time" and "target sensor length".
Input pairs for the first option are 6 and 2; for the second option 8 and 4.

"...We really shouldn’t have gotten involved in this. Really shouldn’t. We trusted our partners’ honesty. Smart scientists, idiots. They fooled us like children for three candies. Consider it our own death sentence and we dug our own grave. That shooter won’t survive anyway. He’ll be killed sooner or later, regardless of whether he reaches the barrier or not. We just won’t know..."
Take a measurement using the external sensor BDPA-07.
Take a measurement using the external sensor BDPB-07.
Take a measurement using the external sensor BDBG-07.
Take a measurement using the external sensor BDCS-07.
External sensor BDPA-07. Measures alpha particle flux density; Recorded nuclides - Plutonium-239, Uranium-234, Uranium-238; Measurement range - 0.1…1500 s??cm??.
External sensor BDPB-07. Measures beta particle flux density with automatic gamma background subtraction; Beta radiation energy range - 0.2…3.5 MeV.
External sensor BDBG-07. Measured quantity - absorbed dose equivalent (X-ray and ? radiation); Energy range - 0.05…3 MeV; Measurement range - 0.1 µSv/h…10 Sv/h.
External sensor BDCS-07. Measures gamma absorbed dose and beta particle flux with automatic gamma background subtraction; Beta radiation energy range - 0.2…3.5 MeV.
Using this will perform the first measurement with the first sensor.
Using this will perform the second measurement with the second sensor.
Using this will perform the third measurement with the third sensor.
Using this will perform the fourth measurement with the fourth sensor.
The value of the first range parameter is set in the settings. To apply it, select the "Range 1" checkbox.
The value of the second range parameter is set in the settings. To apply it, select the "Range 2" checkbox.
The value of the first azimuth parameter is set in the settings. To apply it, select the "Azimuth 1" checkbox.
The value of the second azimuth parameter is set in the settings. To apply it, select the "Azimuth 2" checkbox.
The value of the first elevation angle parameter is set in the settings. To apply it, select the "Elevation angle 1" checkbox.
The value of the second elevation angle parameter is set in the settings. To apply it, select the "Elevation angle 2" checkbox.
Not enough components available to assemble gas masks.

Components: EO-16 filter-absorbing box, connecting tube, helmet-mask ShM-41Mu or ShMS, bag. Includes box with anti-fog films, overlay insulating cuffs NMU-1 (for ShM-41Mu), box with spare membranes for communication device (for ShMS).
Gas mask similar to GP-5 with black mask ShMP, differing in helmet-mask ShM66-u. Mask has ear cutouts (important for military to hear orders) and speech membrane, absent in GP-5.
High-protection gas mask with improved wearing comfort. Military version of GP-7 gas mask with several enhancements over civilian version.

PMK-3, latest generation gas mask, high protection and comfort. Designed to protect respiratory organs, face, and eyes from toxic substances, chemical agents, biological aerosols, and radioactive dust, including CWA and RWA.
Modern general-purpose isolating gas mask. Compact and relatively light compared to other isolating gas masks.
Testing first type of gas masks.
Testing second type of gas masks.
Testing third type of gas masks.
Testing fourth type of gas masks.
Testing fifth type of gas masks.
Special gas mask sample required for testing.
RSh4 Gas Mask. Test protocol 1. Test duration - 10 sec. Fitting coefficient range - 10,000 units.
PMG-2 Gas Mask. Test protocol 2. Test duration - 15 sec. Fitting coefficient range - 15,000 units.
PMK-1 Gas Mask. Test protocol 3. Test duration - 10 sec. Fitting coefficient range - 10,000 units.
PMK-3 Gas Mask. Test protocol 4. Test duration - 20 sec. Fitting coefficient range - 20,000 units.
IP-4 Gas Mask. Test protocol 5. Test duration - 15 sec. Fitting coefficient range - 15,000 units.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: AK-74M rifle, two packs of armor-piercing rounds, gas mask.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: artifact, two anabiotics.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: Beretta 92FS pistol, gas mask, artifact, underbarrel grenade launcher.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: AN-94 "Abakan" rifle, artifact.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: "Wind of Freedom" armor suit, AKM rifle, underbarrel grenade launcher.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: two radio protectors.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: two artifacts.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: Zarya armor suit, three grenades, "Bear" detector.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: "Bizon-2" submachine gun, artifact, detector.
Stalker stash opened. Backpack contents: artifact, three grenades.
Description of the first action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents canned stewed beef, quantity: 3 cans.
Description of the second action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents army biscuits in packs, quantity: 3 packs.
Description of the third action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents special chicken liver p?t? in a can, quantity: 1 can.
Description of the fourth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents special rice porridge with beef in cans, quantity: 2 cans.
Description of the fifth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents energy drink with caffeine in a can, quantity: 1 can.
Description of the first action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents canned stewed beef, quantity: 3 cans.
Description of the second action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents potato puree in sealed packs, quantity: 3 packs.
Description of the third action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents special rice porridge with beef in cans, quantity: 2 cans.
Description of the fourth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents dark chocolate bars, quantity: 2 bars.
Description of the fifth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the ration contents orange juice in a pack, quantity: 1 pack.
Rice porridge with beef; can (250 g); 2 pcs.
Rice porridge with beef; can (250 g); 2 pcs.
Description of the first action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit an individual anti-shock remedy, quantity: 3 pcs.
Description of the second action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit an individual bandage, quantity: 3 pcs.
Description of the third action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit a special anti-radiation drug, quantity: 3 pcs.
Description of the fourth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit a special antidote for organophosphate poisoning, quantity: 2 pcs.
Description of the fifth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit a radio protector, quantity: 1 pc.
Contents of first aid kit AI-2:
Slot 4; antidote for organophosphate poisoning; 2 pcs.
Description of the first action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit an individual anti-shock remedy, quantity: 3 pcs.
Description of the second action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit individual bandages, quantity: 3 pcs.
Description of the third action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit an individual antibacterial agent, quantity: 1 pc.
Description of the fourth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit a special anabiotic, quantity: 2 pcs.
Description of the fifth action. By clicking the button, you will take from the first aid kit an experimental antidote, quantity: 1 pc.
Contents of first aid kit AI-4:
5 Golden Fish artifacts are required to assemble the gravitational set.
5 Mica artifacts are required to assemble the chemical set.
5 Mom's Beads artifacts are required to assemble the thermal set.
To create listening devices, you need 5 special microchips, 15 capacitors, and 10 inductors, each with its own marking.

You need to determine the frequency range that our radio receiver (beacon) can receive if its LC circuit capacitance ranges from 50 pF to 200 pF and the inductance is 50 mH.
If the circuit has capacitance C and coil inductance L, the oscillation period is calculated as: T = 2??(LC). Therefore, the frequency n = 1/T = 1 / (2??(LC))
Possible frequency ranges:
1. from 93 kHz to 186 kHz.
2. from 58 kHz to 269 kHz.
Results: Mustard Gas - 3*10^-3 mg/L, VX - 1*10^-3 mg/L, Other Agents - none.

Description of first action. Sample analysis. Clicking the button opens a window where a specific sequence of actions must be performed. During analysis, numerical values for N1 and N2 must be entered into the designated fields; values are provided in the same window.

Description of second action. Sample evaluation. Clicking the button opens a window where a specific sequence of actions must be performed. During evaluation, numerical coefficient values for X and Y axes must be entered in the fields; values are given in the same window.
Description of third action. Result. Clicking the button opens a window showing the VPHR output visualization. This window can be closed to complete the task.
Reference video pulse parameters: Frequency - 1 kHz, Amplitude - 1.5 mV.
Scale: Input R - 1 M?, Input C - 30 pF; X-scale - 20 µV/div, Y-scale - 50 ms/div
Electrical signal shape: sinusoidal, Period - 0.2 s, Amplitude - 20 V.

Description of first action. Calibration. Clicking the button opens a window where a specific sequence of actions must be performed. During calibration, you must enter the numerical values of the reference video pulse parameters (Amplitude and Frequency) into the designated fields. The values are provided in the calibration window.

Description of second action. Scaling. Clicking the button opens a window where a specific sequence of actions must be performed. During scaling, you must enter the numerical values of the coefficients for the X and Y axes into the designated fields. The values are provided in the scaling window.
Description of third action. Signal visualization. Clicking the button opens a window showing the oscilloscope output. This window can be simply closed to complete the task.
The treatment module has completed its operation.
Diagnostics completed. Using the reference data, determine the possible diagnosis: 1-, 2-, 3-.

Metamizole sodium (“Analgin”) — a drug, analgesic and antipyretic from the pyrazolone group. Withdrawn in many countries due to the risk of agranulocytosis. Belongs to NSAIDs, pyrazolone derivatives. Mechanism similar to other NSAIDs (non-selectively blocks COX and reduces prostaglandin formation from arachidonic acid). Inhibits conduction of pain impulses along Goll and Burdach bundles, raises the excitability threshold of thalamic pain centers, increases heat dissipation. Indications: Fever syndrome (infectious-inflammatory diseases, insect bites—mosquitoes, bees, horseflies, etc., post-transfusion complications); Pain syndrome (mild to moderate): including neuralgia, myalgia, arthralgia. In special cases recommended for hypotension and thready pulse.

Vikasol. Participates in prothrombin formation by the liver and helps normalize blood coagulation. Effects appear 12–18 hours after administration. Indications: Hypo- and vitamin K deficiency, obstructive jaundice, acute hepatitis; parenchymal, capillary, hemorrhoidal, gastric, intestinal, nasal and pulmonary bleeding; wounds, surgery, radiation sickness, thrombocytopenic purpura, last month of pregnancy (to prevent neonatal hemorrhage), uterine juvenile and premenopausal bleeding, spontaneous bleeding before surgeries with difficult hemostasis, septic diseases with hemorrhagic manifestations, anticoagulant overdose (dicoumarin, phenylin). In special cases recommended in shock conditions.

Dicynone. Hemostatic drug. Its blood-stopping action is based on enhancing the first stage of hemostasis (endothelium-platelet interaction). Dicynone protects the endothelium. Proven to increase platelet adhesion, stabilize capillary walls, reducing permeability, inhibits synthesis of prostaglandins causing platelet deaggregation, vasodilation, and increased capillary permeability. Results in reduced bleeding time and blood loss. Does not affect coagulation mechanism, prothrombin time, fibrinolysis, or platelet count (normal). Recommended for low platelet count.

Dioxidine — a domestic synthetic broad-spectrum AMP. Approved for medical use in 1976. Due to toxicology specifics, systemic administration (i.v.) is used only for life-threatening severe anaerobic or mixed infections caused by multi-resistant strains when other AMPs are ineffective or not tolerated. In severe purulent infections can be applied locally, in cavities, or endobronchially. Mechanism: Bactericidal, not fully understood. Activity enhanced in anaerobic environments via induction of reactive oxygen species. In special cases recommended for low leukocyte counts.

Octenisept. Indications — treatment of skin and mucous membranes before diagnostic and surgical procedures in pediatrics, surgery, obstetrics-gynecology, traumatology, proctology, dermatovenereology, ENT, dentistry; wound and burn care; prevention of foot and interdigital mycoses. In special cases recommended for hypertension and near-fainting states.

Bandage — a strip of fabric (gauze, canvas, cloth, flannel) used for dressing wounds. Medical bandage structure consists of complex interweaving of cotton threads in plain weave. The fabric has two perpendicular thread systems. In special cases best applied when the patient is conscious and in normal general condition.

Morphine — a drug with analgesic (opioid) effects. Used in medicine as morphine derivatives, particularly hydrochloride (for injections) and sulfate (oral). Effectively suppresses severe physical and psychogenic pain. Also sedative and suppresses cough reflex. In special cases recommended for weak pulse and normal body temperature.

Tramal — synthetic opioid analgesic with central and spinal action (opens K+ and Ca2+ channels, hyperpolarizes membranes, slows pain impulse conduction), enhances sedative drugs. In special cases used for hyperthermia and rapid pulse.

Reopolyglukin — plasma-substitute solution, increases suspension properties of blood, reduces viscosity, helps restore microcirculation, prevents aggregation of blood elements. Used to improve capillary blood flow for prevention and treatment of traumatic, surgical, toxic, and burn shock. Recommended for hypotension and elevated leukocytes.

Penicillins — antimicrobial drugs, ?-lactam antibiotics. Currently, penicillins are divided into subgroups based on origin, chemical structure, and antimicrobial activity. In special cases recommended for elevated erythrocytes.

Cipran — antimicrobial drug, fluoroquinolone group. Mechanism: inhibits bacterial DNA gyrase and DNA synthesis. Active against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria, including strains resistant to penicillins, cephalosporins, and aminoglycosides. In special cases recommended for high platelet counts.

Erythromycin — bacteriostatic macrolide antibiotic, reversibly binds 50S ribosomal subunit, disrupting peptide bond formation and protein synthesis (does not affect nucleic acid synthesis). At high doses may have bactericidal effect depending on pathogen. Recommended for low erythrocyte count.

Description of first action. Wounded status analysis. Clicking the button will open a window displaying a complete analysis of the wounded person's condition by certain parameters. These indicators must be remembered to later select the necessary drugs for treatment. Drug selection is based on matching specific indicators to the appropriate drug for particular cases. After memorizing the module’s readings, the window can be closed.

Description of second action. Reference information. Clicking the button will open a window containing reference information about the 12 drugs used in the device. The player needs to study this information to select the appropriate drug for use in the third module. Pay attention to special cases; for example, Cipran is recommended when platelet count is elevated, so it should be used when the first module shows corresponding values.

Description of third action. Treatment module. Clicking the button opens a window where the correct combination of drugs must be entered based on the wounded person’s condition. Drugs are administered according to the analysis and matched against reference information.

Description of first action. Signal recognition. Clicking the button opens a window where you must follow a set procedure. During recognition, scan the signal frequency, pass it through band-pass filters, and determine the carrier frequency of the HF pulse. This value is sent to the LF converter for decoding preparation.

Description of second action. Decoding. Clicking the button opens a window where a set procedure must be followed. During decoding, the obtained LF signal passes through a set of decoders. Decoded values are transmitted in binary code and then sent to the decimal code generator.
Description of third action. Final binary code generator. Clicking the button opens a window displaying the generated code and allows its input for hacking. The window can simply be closed after use.
HF signal passed through BP filter... desired F found... converted to LF
Electronic code generation completed... lock hacked.

"..A trial the Lord has sent me.. So many years I suffered, caused suffering, stole, killed.. Ended up in this cursed Zone – and why? To take other lives again for profit.. Hell it is. Hell on earth, while alive.. To suffer, to earn redemption with blood. Past sins – can’t forget, can’t fix, and the future – here it is, among others like me.. The Higher Will knows what awaits me tomorrow, but everything is in my hands, and salvation isn’t given for words or thoughts alone. I must prove by my deeds and example that I am worthy.."

"So, listen up, you patched bastard, you got three days to pay your debt, got it? Three days, bitch. And if there’s no cash – first we’ll deal with your buddy, then the elephant – and to the jumpers. He’ll hop like a goat, got it? Fifty bucks from you, punk, or equal payback with fireworks. Arrow in the port district, at six. If there are other fools – we’ll tear them to pieces."

"So, here’s the deal. Me and the guys are chilling, drinking, telling jokes, talking about girls and stuff... Then Valerych runs in – he’s our young one, we put him on the watchtower to keep guard, just in case. So he comes running, eyes wide, shouting that a squad of soldiers is heading from the factory towards us… Oh my!!! How? Where did they come from? Well, that’s minor. The main thing is to get out fast. But damn… While we were stuffing loot into bags, they got close, and somehow they handled everything perfectly. While we were gawking at the loot, they managed to surround us from all sides. Well, I thought, you’ve had it, stalker Kosmos. Now they’ll tear you apart and won’t ask your name. I screamed into the radio, but without much hope that anyone would respond, and got ready to sell my skin dearly. Vitya and Valerych were on alert too, but kept calm. So we took defensive positions, waiting…"

"Fox, they’ve got the case with the artifacts. I sent the young ones there ahead of time so we don’t waste time, and told them to wait for you. In case anything happens – they’ll cover you during the deal. The guys aren’t very experienced, so take care of them. They don’t have info about the target, and they shouldn’t be told the details. There’s a reason for that. If they start bragging while drunk about who went where – the debt collectors will find out, and I won’t share info with them. Besides, even without details, they won’t make sense of what’s going on. Basically, as always, the fewer people know – the smoother it goes. Stay in touch…"

"They kept them in a cage in the basement.. There were four at first, now only two remain. Baro and his men torture them every day. Two couldn’t take it and died. I haven’t been there myself; one of our elders stands guard at the cage. He told me how Baro and his men cut them up. They just screamed and spat but didn’t tell anything. Horrible, he said.. They skewered their guts.. I’ve seen a lot, but never such horror... Mukha, my assistant, brings them food and water, and even he came back pale from the shift. Fascists, he said, probably wouldn’t do this.. We didn’t think long, left with Mukha. Now there’s no way back, but screw it – better alone than sharing the land with this beast.. Mukha once talked about Prozoreniye, they say they need people and can defend themselves. We’ll try it, maybe it works."

15 August 2014, 10:21 … the only survivor. If not for this ladder… Damn marks either died down there or escaped. No way to check – these creatures are waiting for me. I hear their breathing, smell their stench. Or is that Oleg’s corpse?.. 16:36 Communication device is failing, no contact with the center. Seems like an outside release. Blocked the descent with junk. Hear no sounds – maybe they’ve gone?… 16 August 2014, 06:40 … Tried to open the lock on the grate. Almost no water left, Oleg brought rations.. Can’t force myself down – someone is scratching and growling below. Must go down.. So thirsty.. 12:28 My leg hurts so much! Managed to stop the bleeding, injected anabolic, two left. Managed to go down, found Oleg’s corpse. All gnawed.. Took remaining water and rations, almost all torn and bloody. Apparently, they heard me, barely got on the ladder, something grabbed my left leg. Damn, damn, damn!!.. How it hurts now.. 17 August 2014, 19:42 Everything before my eyes blurs… leg swollen, no longer hurts.. stench.. bastards whining, asking to pet them.. Oleg, I didn’t want.. didn’t want! Only one could make it.. I made it… made it…"

"Why did we all come here? What drove us? Profit, artifacts, money? What exactly? Why did everything turn out this way? Why have we all become its eternal captives? Won’t it let go? Strange… Why did I never notice this before? Every time I went on a raid, I tried not to think about it. The face of my beloved daughter makes me live… Her cheerful, lively, and pure eyes… Her smile… And nothing more… The Zone destroyed me from within, and I am its slave… almost lost my key to Freedom… Almost…"

"…Ah, now I wish I could light the bath, and those girls that went to the victory with Toha… Ah, those were the times. Where did it all go? Toha never married his Marinka. Yet he swore and promised he would… How… All it took was to remind him of the shimmer of the green wolf chevron. Then he lost it like the devil and rushed to the base… And all his love – where did it go… Although, who knows… He would have returned only from the raid. Need to find out, maybe he still has that redhead girl’s phone… Heh, what am I talking about… Daydreaming… Soup in the pot almost cold… Brownie, the bastard, snores nearby… I’m just sitting here waiting for Toha’s quad to return from the mission… Just hope the guys come back alive…"

"Phew, caught my breath. Leg still hurts. Damn snork jumped out too suddenly. At least no fracture. Had to spend the last bullets from the rifle to calm it down. But all that is minor trouble, as someone said. Who exactly, I don’t remember. These memories aren’t mine – they belong to that other person. The person I used to be. Where did Lyokha go, that’s what worries me now. And where is the exit from this underground? When the zombies attacked, we had to run very fast. I lost sight of him for a few seconds, and when I turned around – he was gone. Maybe he turned into a side tunnel? He couldn’t have died. He’s not one to give up easily. No wonder they call him the Demon…"

"…Around midnight, we – a group of scientists, captured or recruited at different times and places around the world – were brought to some transit point. The journey was long. Everyone is treated the same. Both those who work for money and those who are scared, whose families remain hostages. I am scared. The veneer of civilization was too thin. First, each of us, individually, was brought to an animal state with constant threats, public torture, and humiliation. Some couldn’t endure the physical pain, others, initially boasting, talking about their significance in the scientific world, about special services that would rescue them, broke down, lost hope…"

"…In Central Africa, at the temporary transit point where we first saw each other, many lifted their spirits. After a long period of isolation, everyone felt much better: we, broken individually, dreamed that together we could find a way to escape or at least signal our dire situation. The camp is guarded by mercenaries. They are completely unsociable, but strictly disciplined. For any violation – death…"

"…I look at them and think: our governments could have pursued a different policy. Instead of leading the world to collapse and chaos, spending billions on political intrigues and obvious adventures, they should have cared about the general level of welfare and education of the peoples inhabiting the Earth. After what they did to me, such thoughts do not seem naive. The senseless abuse I suffered not only destroyed my will but also erased many illusions. We are doomed. The world is doomed. I do not know what goals the inhuman captors set for themselves, but they feel like the absolute masters of the situation. Using the technological achievements of civilization, they couldn’t care less about any law of the civilized world…"

"…I am scared. Brutal, beastly force breaks the thin partitions of consciousness, destroys illusions, creating a persistent feeling of hopelessness. I ask myself: why and how did this become possible? The answer is simple and lies on the surface: half a century of double-standard politics and blatant duplicity have created the illusion of impunity for many groups operating under the protection of governments of certain countries. We ourselves have nurtured a new strain of plague. A moral plague. This is especially clear from here – the very bottom of the abyss we had to fall into…"

Access code will be denoted as follows:\niьцж ыеь ршкъъь еь пеь дьодчсаке пкцьдкфа активе It is necessary to study and apply the encryption method using binary code. The cipher itself and the key are known only to some members of the group.

The key to the cipher is as follows: Encryption using binary code: Each letter of the Russian alphabet is encrypted in binary code, for example: A = 00000, B = 00001, V = 00010, G = 00011…, YA = 11111. Example: the word ШИФР. In binary code it looks like: 11000 01000 10100 10000 Now perform a LEFT shift by 1 step, we get the code: 10000 10001 01001 00001 Now convert back to letters, we get the text: RSЙB For decryption, you need to perform a RIGHT shift to obtain the binary code of the original combination.

%c[0,1,0,0]• %c[default]The cursed Zone. Nothing remains here. Only death. Unbearable, terrible, inhuman. Death penetrates and envelops every particle, every stone, every leaf from a fallen tree with its heavy shroud. Death breeds pain. Pain brings no relief, does not allow forgetting all this horror, it only burns you. Burns again and again, as long as you are still able to perceive anything. What is happening seems beyond our comprehension. We are blind, lost between the facets of reality. Damn it, how I hate all this. But I have no way out. I must get up, check my rifle, and move on, while it is still possible. While I am still able to walk... Those guys from Duty—she destroyed them so easily, leaving nothing but pain. Why? Who were those people in black uniforms, bringing death… I do not know. And I do not want to know. I only hope to reach my own to the bunker… alive...\n

%c[0,1,0,0]• %c[default]To synthesize the poison, a chemical reaction must be carried out using three key components. Before starting the synthesis, the concentrations of the input starting components must be calculated. One of the two possible reactions in the process, chosen depending on the catalyst, has the following coefficients for reactants and products: X*(OCH3)3 + Y*(CN)2 + Z*(CH3)2 = 2*(OCH3)(CN)5 + 6*(CH3) + 2*(OCH3)2 X*(OCH3)2 + Y*(CN)2 + Z*(CH3)2 = 2*(OCH3)(CN)3(CH3) + 8*(CH3) + 2*(OCH3) The concentration of one unit of a substance at the input is 10. Calculate the coefficients in the equation and multiply them by 10 to determine the input concentrations of the components. Possible values of X, Y, Z multiplied by 10:
 30 50 20
 30 20 50
 20 50 30
 20 30 50
 50 30 20
 50 20 30
Radio frequency range, channel number and type:
Channel 1; frequency 48.975 MHz; closed peacekeeping forces channel.
Channel 2; frequency 49.025 MHz; closed Duty faction channel.
Channel 3; frequency 51.250 MHz; closed Freedom faction channel.
Channel 4; frequency 51.925 MHz; closed Mercenaries faction channel.
Channel 5; frequency 53.250 MHz; closed Monolith faction channel.

Description of the first action. Clicking the button will tune the radio to receive a signal from the first closed channel of the peacekeeping forces. To stop reception, press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is not possible.

Description of the second action. Clicking the button will tune the radio to receive a signal from the first closed channel of the Duty faction. To stop reception, press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is not possible.

Description of the third action. Clicking the button will tune the radio to receive a signal from the first closed channel of the Freedom faction. To stop reception, press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is not possible.

Description of the fourth action. Clicking the button will tune the radio to receive a signal from the first closed channel of the Mercenaries faction. To stop reception, press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is not possible.

Description of the fifth action. Clicking the button will tune the radio to receive a signal from the first closed channel of the Monolith faction. To stop reception, press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is not possible.

Once, when Muhammad was sleeping near the Kaaba, he was awakened by Jibril. The angel brought with him an extraordinary creature named Buraq, which had carried all the Prophets, and now would carry Muhammad. Muhammad mounted Buraq, and it carried Him through the air to Jerusalem. There, He met Ibrahim (Abraham), Musa (Moses), Isa (Jesus), and other Prophets. They all prayed together, with Muhammad leading the prayer, after which He was offered three vessels: one with water, one with wine, and one with milk. Muhammad chose the vessel with milk, signifying that His community would follow the true path. Since then, wine has been forbidden for Muslims. After this, a ladder descended, and He, together with Jibril, ascended through the seven heavens. On the lowest heaven, He saw Adam determining the fate of the souls of the deceased. Angels showed Muhammad hell, and He felt the heat of the fire and saw the terrible torments of sinners. Ascending from heaven to heaven, He encountered Prophets: on the second – Isa, on the third – Yusuf, on the fourth – Idris, on the fifth – Harun, on the sixth – Musa, on the seventh – Ibrahim...

...Then Muhammad visited paradise, where He saw the bliss of the believers. Afterwards, Allah spoke to Him and commanded Muslims to pray 50 times a day. As Muhammad returned downward, Musa persuaded Him to ask Allah to reduce the number of prayers. This process repeated several times until the number of prayers for Muslims was reduced to 5 per day. When Muhammad recounted His journey, people did not believe Him. They said: “A caravan takes a whole month to get there, how can you fly there in a single night?” Even His faithful friend Abu Bakr doubted. Then Muhammad described Jerusalem as He saw it from above, which He had never visited before. These descriptions matched Abu Bakr’s memories of the city, confirming the truth of Muhammad’s words. He also described a caravan He had seen from above. The caravan arrived in Mecca shortly after, confirming His account.

Once, a mullah came to a hall to address the believers. The hall was empty, except for a young groom sitting in the first row. The mullah thought to himself: “Should I speak or not?” He decided to ask the groom: - There is no one here except you, do you think I should speak or not? The groom replied: - Master, I am a simple man, I understand nothing of this. But when I come to the stables and see all the horses have run away, and only one remains, I still feed it. Taking these words to heart, the mullah began his sermon. He spoke for over two hours, and upon finishing, felt a sense of relief. He wanted to hear confirmation of how good his speech had been. He asked: - How did you like my sermon? - I already said I am a simple man and do not understand much. But if I come to the stable and see all the horses have run away, and only one remains, I still feed it. But I will not give it all the feed intended for all the horses.

Ibrahim grew disillusioned with idols and sought other gods: “When night covered him, he saw a star and said: ‘This is my Lord!’ When it set, he said: ‘I do not love those that set.’ When he saw the moon rising, he said: ‘This is my Lord!’ When it set, he said: ‘If my Lord does not guide me, I shall be among the lost.’ When he saw the sun rising, he said: ‘This is my Lord, the greatest!’ When it set, he said: ‘O my people! I am free from what you associate with Him. Now I turn my face toward Him who created the heavens and the earth, and I am not of the polytheists.’ (Quran, 6:76-79)

An Eastern ruler wanted to learn the entire history of humanity. A sage brought him five hundred volumes. Busy with state affairs, the king sent him away, instructing him to condense it into a shorter form. Twenty years later, the sage returned: the history of humanity now took up only fifty volumes, but the king was already too old to go through such thick books, and sent the sage away again. Another twenty years passed, and the aged, white-haired sage brought the ruler a single volume containing all the wisdom of the world he wished to know. But the king lay on his deathbed and had no time to read even that one book. Then the sage summarized the history of humanity in one line: ‘Man is born, suffers, and dies.’
